item.title: March Patch Tuesday visits 15 product families
item.description:
Eight Critical-severity bugs – none in Windows – appear in 84-CVE haul

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: Patch Tuesday, x-ops, Microsoft, Windows, detection

item.title: Android devices ship with firmware-level malware
item.description:
Keenadu malware gives an attacker control over a device but appears to be used primarily to facilitate ad fraud

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: Android, Keenadu

item.title: NICKEL ALLEY strategy: Fake it ‘til you make it
item.description:
Victimizing software developers via fake companies, jobs, and code repositories to steal cryptocurrency

item.title: Incident responders, s'il vous plait: Invites lead to odd malware events
item.description:
A phishing campaign targeting multiple organizations led to RMM installations – but not much else (yet). A threat actor experimenting, or an access-as-a-service attack underway?

Categories: Threat Research

Tags: STAC6405, infostealer, RMM, Phishing
